channel.title: go on Abhishek's blog
channel.description: Recent content in go on Abhishek's blog

item.title: Redis Streams in Action - Part 4 (Serverless Go app to monitor tweets processor)
item.description: Welcome to this series of blog posts which covers Redis Streams with the help of a practical example. We will use a sample application to make Twitter data available for search and query in real-time.

item.title: Redis Streams in Action - Part 3 (Java app to process tweets with Redis Streams)
item.description: Welcome to this series of blog posts which covers Redis Streams with the help of a practical example. We will use a sample application to make Twitter data available for search and query in real-time.

item.title: Redis Streams in Action — Part 2 (Tweets consumer app)
item.description: Welcome to this series of blog posts which covers Redis Streams with the help of a practical example. We will use a sample application to make Twitter data available for search and query in real-time.

item.title: Redis Streams in Action: Part 1 (Intro and overview)
item.description: Welcome to this series of blog posts which covers Redis Streams with the help of a practical example. We will use a sample application to make Twitter data available for search and query in real-time.

item.title: RediSearch in Action
item.description: Redis has a versatile set of data structures ranging from simple Strings all the way to powerful abstractions such as Redis Streams.

item.title: Build fault tolerant applications with Cassandra API for Azure Cosmos DB
item.description: Azure Cosmos DB is a resource governed system that allows you to execute a certain number of operations per second based on the provisioned throughput you have configured.
